textByHash.11d09f33f2bcf015923d63a83fed2251aa537a7b: A day or so ago, they decided it was a fun game to put me in this sack: then they forgot about me!
textByHash.3ea74b0f3e7e0d58d727cbb717f5b408b7a5143f: Ok, I will see you there then!
textByHash.734d21e7662fffc0838f8219a8aba543a50a630b: I said I will see you there then!
textByHash.7765111d93241cf358b40a8027d6c86d63a32524: Wow, thank you! I could hardly breathe in there!
textByHash.7be3dfee4d231ab3a7a12badd8133c9acc4b35aa: My father? You have spoken to him recently?
textByHash.7f51e72e20a42610455cf87e449e6f747e274f29: After going on a long and challenging quest to retrieve the boots of Arkaneeses, defeating many powerful enemies on the way, I fell into a goblin trap!
textByHash.876191ddd8e47693093551fdf15791eaababa357: Huh? I think you're confusing me with somebody else...
textByHash.a17e08a996d245756d4c9370d40f80637e6fd123: I have not been able to find that castle again though...
textByHash.caf07117b32bcd4e241ad9c59049074fbdd88b91: I'm now very hungry, and my bones feel very stiff.
textByHash.cf5a5b22ac2e2c7f34e0e4c0dc09d457c3066a3a: I've been kept as a slave here for the last 3 months!
textByHash.f00f2cb4dcd416ad8bde38198617cc25e85f1262: I have been told that before.
